productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Max S2S Grey Sports Shoes
description: The nike Air Max S2S is popular among acknowledged groups. Offering premium quality and comfort, myntra has jumped the line to bring to you the best of the best running shoes in town. Designed with maximum cushioning and seamless Fit, there's no better running shoe than the nike Air Max S2S. UpperSingle layer textile upper with strategically placed overlaysPlush collar reduces slippage and provides a great step-in feelCentral lace upsPadded mesh innerMidsoleDeep flex grooves at the midsole with Air Max technologyPhylon midsoleOutsoleRubber outsole with rubber pods at the forefoot and heelDeep flex groovesHerringbone patterned grooves on the podsshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
